title: pleopeltis linearis
intro: Pleopeltis linearis, also known as the linear polypody, is a species of epiphytic fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The linear polypody has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. This fern is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the linear polypody is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
